---
title: "Page not found"
subtitle: "That URL doesn't resolve to a page on this site. Likely a typo, a stale bookmark, or an old link from before we restructured something."
toc: false
---

## Where you might have meant to go

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**Looking for the cash-side charts?**

- [Price–weight explorer](price-weight.qmd) — what does each weight class fetch on average
- [Weekly seasonality](seasonality.qmd) — when in the year do prices peak
- [Weekly trends](weekly-trends.qmd) — calendar timeline since October 2017
- [Basis](basis.qmd) — Clovis cash vs CME GF feeder futures
- [Sell-now compare](sell-now-compare.qmd) — is this week high, low, or middle
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**Looking for the LRP charts?**

- [LRP explorer](lrp.qmd) — what does the program look like
- [LRP backtest](lrp-backtest.qmd) — did LRP pay more than it cost

**Looking for documentation?**

- [Methodology](methodology/index.qmd) — how every figure is computed
- [Data catalog](data.qmd) — every committed snapshot
- [Glossary](glossary.qmd) — plain-language definitions
- [About](about.qmd) — who maintains this and how to engage
:::

:::

## Or start from the home page

[**→ Livestock Marketing Alternatives Explorer**](/) — the home page lists every chart and document on the site.

## Reporting a broken link

If you got here by clicking a link from somewhere on the site (rather than typing a URL by hand or following an old bookmark), that's a bug. Please [open an issue](https://github.com/lma-explorer/lma-explorer.github.io/issues/new/choose) with the page you were on and the link you clicked, and we'll fix the link.
